channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: FIRE is mental illness — 190 replies — 760.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
FIRE is mental illness

Open thread • Replies: 190 • Updated: 2026-05-22 20:04 UTC

OP

No woman, no kids, $25k YEARLY spend.
You're not supposed to check out of society in your 30s and spend the rest of your life relaxing. What is wrong with modern men?

Early replies (first 3)

62259938
>>62259935
Keep slaving away goyman

62259945
>>62259935
Nice bait thread faggot

62259968
>>62259935
You can't really afford to marry on FIRE because one divorce ruins a decade+ of saving and then you have to work again. If a woman finds out you're FIRE she will absolutely divorce rape you too since the wealth disparity between you and her is so great she'll walk away with a ludicrous amount of money.

Huge downside of FIRE, you can never marry.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62262946
>>62261134
Are you uncircumcised? I heard a lot of girls don't like sucking uncut penises because of the smell. Not that there's anything you can really do about it but thats the reason why

62262961
>>62259935
found the kike

62262966
>>62260605
You get a 1.6% return? You’re lying or completely retarded. I’m assuming alarm by a retard.

If you really had 2.5M you could lock up over 5% in 30yr treasuries right now. Thats $125k a year guaranteed.

62262975
>>62260877
> Cash out you retard before the market crashes and you lose your 1.3m.
Still waiting on this crash I’ve been hearing about for over a decade

62262982
>>62261016
Ok. So what? You sell, split the gain, and you keep all your income generating assets which have also likely appreciated in value. Or she keeps the house and buys you out. Or you keep the house and buy her out.

It sucks, but it’s a hardly “lose everything” situation.

62263085
>>62259935
It's not that great, I had 120 million a one point i spent a few years living in a covered lead zinc mine done as as a kind of evil villian lair (firing rage, cinema, arcade, even has a garden with a little watterfall) alone aside from very rare meetings. I came back up to find out I've kind of disconnected from everyone except god. I spend most of my time doing direct charity work (it's no good giving it to charities it winds up with some cunt paying himself a salary). everyone thinks I'm homeless or something when they meet me.

The only advise I have is get a dog. I've gone though every form or flavor of woman possible and yes, I have kids who are provided for and are now in their mid 20s and I spent a two decades looking after. never hear from them because they hsve no idea how wealhy I am (one told me that I should not be eating cake in a hotel if I was uneployed!). One used to surface to meet at Christmas and it's birthday to get a haul of presents but did no even bother to call his year.

Such is life. I'm geting tired of life on he surface again, maybe another year and I am going back underground.

62263105
>>62263085
me

62263162
>>62261104
Why would she record that? It’s not like she’d know you were going to say it. Not like you’d repeat it either.

62263168
>>62261112
I think that’s why he said fuck you I’m playing another year and winning another super bowl

62263178
>>62262879
This my first wife ran off with someone off the internet when my kids were toddlers and took three houses and cleared me out. She married me probebly because i had a couple of million at that point and as soon as the kids were in school and creche she screwed me over. She has no idea how wealthy I became either alhough I made sure the kids got everything they needed and wanted and good educations, university paid all that. She sold the three houses and the kids cut contact with her completely and like I say were on touch with me and I used bring them on holidays and that for about three months a year. I heard she was actually working at a mcdonalds drive in at one point.

Its funny how many friends and people who love you appear when they think ou are rick and fascinating how they vanish when they think you don't have money. a bit grim but true.

Funny but true, I own a shed load of banksy I got when they were 100$ just because I liked them and one kids was going on and on about art to me, so I said here and gave hem a copy of last exist from the giftshop. Thining if they showed any interest at all, I'd give them a million worth. The kid told me that they did no hink much of it and had no inerest in it. I'd bet if I had showed hem where i is stored and how much it was all worth they would have been interested.

I'll tell you people are what they are. nothing more. I loved my father and used call him ever day for a chat and made sure mother was comfy.

If your woife divorces you, she ges pre much everhing ou have at the time of divorce and you pay child support until the kids are ou of university but it does not go to them it goes to he mother, you will have o pay for everything from sneakers to schoolbags to clubs and university fees and healthcare and xboxes because ou can be absolutely certain she won't. For mos men no faul of heir own i is basicall impossible. i know i was very very lucky. Still a poinless exercise for me at least

62263190
Anyway buy no I only come back to post onn this board ever few years and I posted yesterday and today. That's enough,.See you all in another few years.

62263239
Oh well. Just be rich and buy sex.
Retired at 27.

62263275
>>62261451
correct minus the desire to live in the woods. would prefer to live by the water. I like being innawoods walking/hiking sometimes backpacking, just no desire to live there permanently.

62263308
>>62261114
Dependapotamus. Military guys marry young and quickly because they get better pay and living condition upgrades. Women turn into entitled hogs (more than before). She was probably attractive when they met.

62263322
>>62261296
>>62261430
If anything he took her money. Somehow she made more money from modeling and clothing/perfume than he made.

Based Tom letting the cheating walked whore go, winning another SB, then fucking hotter, younger puss.

62263327
>>62262303
It’s better than whatever the first guy is doing that allegedly gets 1.5-1.6%

62263355
>>62262879
> the judge can just throw out the Pre-Nup for no reason at all.
Go on, oh wise one. Show us which states and where this has happened.

There’s a massive difference between
>wife signs that she gets nothing if you divorce
And
>both parties agree that pre-marital assets are returned to original party

62263374
>>62263178
>illiterate retard is actually super rich and successful
I don’t believe you. More importantly did you
>have a prenup
>have a prenup that specifically separated pre-marital assets
>get your prenup thrown out
No shit divorce rape is real. No one is saying it isn’t. But you retards can’t read

62263428
>>62261325
>>62261786
>>62260605

Yeah for whatever reason people just pretend like this shit is binary. You FIRE, you live on beans and the moment you can live on beans forever without working you quit your job and eat beans for life.

You could just be really frugal, hit enough that you comfortably pay for that shit for forever and then keep working a bit and inflate your lifestyle to be comfier, still being careful about how you spend your money. In the meantime, if you lose your job or want to quit or take a risk investing you can all while not risking your lifestyle or freedom.

The dumbest shit imaginable is doing the typical retard normie thing of NOT SAVING NEARLY ANYTHING. Like they've been working for more than a year and they don't have $10k saved. They spend all the money they make in a month and then more on their credit cards. As long as they (usually) have enough to pay the rent then everything else can be whatever monthly minimum payment they can make. Then the MOMENT something happens, their car needs service or they lose their job or something they're FUCKED.

So anyways, not having $10k or $100k saved is basically a financial emergency and you SHOULD immediately go full lentils cheapfaggot mode until you get at LEAST to that amount of money. Keep working if you want and spend a bit more but holy shit if you have no money that's a pants-on-fire moment

62263496
>>62261282
if you think society is so bad then why are you alive? It must be ok enough. if you had kids they'd probably think they'd rather be alive than not. You just deprive yourself of the enjoyment of being a dad

62263540
>>62260375
>warm hole
the point is to have kids and grow old with someone. You know, actual fulfillment instead of niggermaxxing to instant gratification and being miserable at 40+

62263557
>>62262942
wouldn't you feel bad about being a deadbeat dad? If it's a girl she'll become a whore guaranteed. If a son, he'll likely join a gang. Seen it many times.

62263591
So many old married losers in here

62263605
>>62263355
>Go on, oh wise one. Show us which states and where this has happened.
Most states, but especially red states with “muh family protector” laws on the books that basically means the man is legally required to care for his ex-wife. West Virginia is one of the worst offenders.

Look at all the ways a pre-nup can be nullified, and look at how vague the wording is. For example, a pre-nup can be thrown out if it is “overly one-sided” such as a man, who owns the majority of assets, retaining all his assets. Of course, all pre-nups are one sided because women own no equity ever, but if a judge says, “Mhm, dis here is one-sided nigga.” You’re done.

Also, the judge can decide that your wife “signed under duress.”

Or any other million of scenarios where the pre-nup gets nullified in court.

Once again, you are a fucking retard and should shut the fuck up.

62263636
The average age of internet users is going up. So funny reading the shit of normie men on reddit and here sometimes larping as old and wise.

62263653
>>62263636
So much relationship advice on Reddit is just 35 year old, fat fuck dudes saying
>When I was in college, I never got laid, but now I’m 35, and I found a retired whore single mom.
>So I heckin’ stepped up and became the betabux provider I was meant to be, unlike you chudds
Then it gets 20,000 updoots.

62263797
>>62259980
This.
No way they kept their expenses that low, while owning a house (so presumably in the 'burbs) throughout their 20's and had a life at the same time.
They're not going to have the social skills or personality to attract a decent girl and the wealth disparity will absolutely attract women planning to run off with half of it after five years.
>>62262729
The point of marriage is to share a life, grow together, and have a family with someone. Not to basically be bf/gf at the ripe age of 40, except with legal liabilities, while pretending there's a real bond.

62263812
>>62262791
This. If you meet a girl in your early 20's, marry by mid/late 20's, that's different. That's authentic.
This new paradigm of "not supposed to marry until you have half a mil net worth at 35+" is not what marriage was for nearly all of human history. The relationships are way less likely to be as strong and the social and financial liabilities it creates for men are nowhere close to the reward.

62263815
what's so great about kids? The amount of propaganda lately is crazy.

62263849
>>62263797
I’ll never understand the whole dink thing. just pointless to get married if you don’t plan on having kids.

item.title: PACK. A. SANDWHICH. WITH. SOME. CHIPS. — 102 replies — 408.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
PACK. A. SANDWHICH. WITH. SOME. CHIPS.

Open thread • Replies: 102 • Updated: 2026-05-22 19:57 UTC

OP

PACK. A. SANDWHICH.

WITH. SOME. CHIPS.

Early replies (first 3)

62262487
>>62262449
maybe don't buy guac if you are poor and it costs $4.90

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62263257
>>62263206
Holy shit I want to squat and bench and walk uphill on a treadmill and sit in the sauna (yes I ice my balls). My gym is literally $11.99 a month and I'm not a poorfag.

>$300 a month on membership, clothes, food, supplements

If you're in an area that's not white then you need to spend a premium to get away from the dangerous minorities.

Getting high protein foods that are calorie efficient involves something of a premium, if you also want that to be super easy and shelf-stable then you really need to spend more.

You don't need to spend crazy amounts of money to get relatively jacked but you do need more than a pullup bar and dips.

62263268
>>62263252
You clearly long for the prisoner life, you aspire to be like them.

62263272
>>62262449
>>62262474
Thats a lot of sugars. Swap the apples out for a raw veggie and the PB&J out for ham or turkey w/ cheese. Will cost almost exactly the same. Point stands though if you arent retarded and have even caveman level cookies abilities grocery costs are almost a non issue until you have kids. All my coworkers live at home and eat out 3 meals a day and wonder why they have money problems. I have my own place and easily afford it because im not stupid and am capable of cooking, and dont finance $40,000 sports cars.

62263303
>>62263268
Low IQ faggot.

62263312
>>62263146
>but taxes and costs were a lot lower too
No they weren't.
Federal Income Tax was 25% on full time minimum wage.
Gold was artificially suppressed in 1970 because of Bretton Woods pinning it to 35 an ounce from 1945, while inflation was still happening around the world. That's the reason we went off the gold standard.

62263321
>>62263257
I’m sick of these posts. Every time I say something like “college is expensive” someone responds “it was free for me!” Shut the fuck up. There’s no gym in any area that isn’t a piece of fucking shit charging $10. You’ll also waste time, opportunity cost. And spend food on proteins, extra food to build muscle. To get results it takes over people’s lives. It’s all marketing and gay.

62263326
>>62263312
Went off in 1973 if I remember right. So they had a decade to buy a hard asset. They could buy any asset and have decades of massive inflation make them rich. Now their kids are in that inflated world with no assets because boomers don’t pass down wealth. They give it all to Jewish doctors at the end.

62263329
>>62263303
I'm not the one fellating people for eating bread for every meal and doing calisthenics like a poor

62263342
>>62263326
>Why didn't *everybody* buy gold?
Jesus Christ anon, are you fucking serious?

62263350
>>62263342
I didn't say that. So no, I'm not serious you low reading comprehension mother fucker.

62263381
>>62263329
Holy shit anon. You really are a retard. Meat is a great, they don't have a choice in their diet, with a few exceptions. The point is that body weight, a couple free weights (prisoners will make their own shitty weights with water and magazines or whatever, you can buy a kettlebell), and discipline gets people a body far better than average. It actually takes very little work, and is for the most part free, or maybe a few one time payments.

Not to mention how many go to the gym to lose weight. And that's absolutely retarded. You can just not eat until you're thin. I mean after 40 days, you could take a break just to make sure electrolytes don't get all fucked up, but with a few caveats you can just not eat until thin. Everyone is so fucked from marketing that they spend all their money and get shit results and then defend the system to death. "No anon I have to eat every single fucking day 9 times a day otherwise the Jewish marketers tell me I'll lose all my muscle and die!"

62263433
>>62262899
OMG ANON YOU LITERALLY DISCOVERED COOKING OMGGGGGGGGG SO SMART

62263438
>>62263350
>That's not what I'm saying
>>62263326
>So they had a decade to buy a hard asset. They could buy any asset and have decades of massive inflation make them rich. Now their kids are in that inflated world with no assets because boomers don’t pass down wealth

62263446
>>62263438
Anon what in the fuck do you think that sentence means and what the fuck are you trying to say? Faggot Reddit humor and staring into the camera awkwardly is not a legitimate response to somebody.

62263464
>>62263433
A lot of anons are like you. They don’t know IQ exists and how different groups think. I mean 85 IQ individuals can barely even sweep a floor. They aren’t doing cost and time analysis. So yes, in some sense being able to budget, plan, and get satisfaction out of food proves I’m at least average intelligence. The fact you don’t know this means you’re likely below average intelligence, or if not, because I’ve met very isolated people who only hang out in their IQ range, it means you don’t really know anything about reality and are useless. So either way you’re a piece of garbage.

62263476
>Just stop eating good food like beef and steak
>Just stop enjoying simple pleasures in life and cook at home
>Just sacrifice your time if you want to cook elaborate meals that you could afford before
>Just get a better job that pays more
>Just drive less and walk more it's cheaper on gas

Why are Republicans like this? Genuinely why?

62263483
>>62263464
you're above average intelligence because you discovered cooking your own meals will allow you to save a lot of money as well as eat better?
Did i get that correctly?
May i ask how old you are and how long did it take before you gather the courage to learn to cook and realize that financial secret?

62263493
>>62263146
A minimum wagie back then had about half the purchasing power as a software developer now, maybe more. But back then few people were investing in gold, they probably would have bought a house (but as a single income family)

62263507
>>62263476
They aren’t. Any more questions, retard?

62263513
>>62263476
>>62263476
> I am entitled to beef and steak even when I can’t afford it
> I am entitled to having someone else cook for me even when I have no money

Why are liberals such entitled babies that think everyone should give them steaks for free?

62263521
>>62263483
To do it quickly, cheaply, and have it taste restaurant quality, yes I would say that makes me likely above average intelligence. I don’t see anyone else doing it. While I might add, being fit, having a career, and a side business. It’s not like I’m on welfare and have nothing to do but think of my next meal.

So are you going to say something or just ask more questions like a cowardly little faggot. How about instead of asking questions, be a first mover. Have your own fucking idea. Take a stance on something by and defend it. Instead of larping as Socrates which I doubt you even know you’re doing.

62263530
>>62262851
>why are you looking at the price of an asset which has been a standard unit of value for all human history

62263539
>>62263513
You'll never get a house even if you drop the beef. Just eat it.

62263573
>>62263539
I already own a house and eat steak whenever I want because I’m not some poor person whining about what I can’t afford

62263602
>>62263513
Whatever happened to the American dream? Is it really now just to slave away at a minimum wage job all your life or die if you get sick because you get put into generational debt?

62263622
Back in my day we went to imright.com to dig up facts to support our points. Nowadays the kids just generate ai responses and post them at each other. Its fucking over.

62263722
>>62263521
yeah, the reality is that does not qualify you as above average intelligence. You should have realized that long ago. The fact you even didn't for a portion of your life actually means you fed yourself with goyslop, uber 30$ meals with indian poop and ass hairs mixed in it. Hence why it's important to know your age to assess your own retardation.
Surely socrate wasn't the only individual to ask questions. Faggot.

62263732
>>62262760
Just drive an uninsured car without a phone

62263808
>>62263732
quintessentially based.

62263811
>>62263722
This is just embarrassing to read. You’re a retard. “Muh ass hairs”. You’re fucking gay and I don’t care to hear about your fetishes.

item.title: NTDOY — 58 replies — 139.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
NTDOY

Open thread • Replies: 58 • Updated: 2026-05-22 19:46 UTC

OP

Currently Nintendo stock is extremely mispriced. All the short-term doom and gloom is priced in, ignoring the company's tremendous long-term upside. While it's not some 10x your money in a week meme coin, at this point it's a sleeper stock to hold you should know about.

Early replies (first 3)

62259388
>>62259371
its not mispriced. they make shitty games for 80+$. no one wants to buy their crap because its shit.

62259405
>NTDOY baggie
KWAB

62259407
>>62259371
not misspriced
no point in shilling your bags here btw
>>62259388
this and console era is coming to an end. Future will be only game stations with steam like platforms. retards still go for the ps5 by some sort of pavlovian reflex. it's just a standardized computer with a standardized controller. Nintendo shined for a while 30 years ago now it has become so cringe i can't stand their adds like wtf is even this shit

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62259884
>>62259808
Video games aren't dead. Consoles and reliance on proprietary IPs is. Gaming continues in phones for casuals and PC indies for the hardcore crowd. It's funny because had you invested in phones and social media instead of gaming companies since the early 2010s you'd be massively better off than an investment in Nintendo. Who's talking about "it'll be different this time"?

And anyway, yes, the world is different in 2026 than it was in 1980. Investment is about the future, not staring at previous success and insisting it'll happen again. What is Nintendo doing that could possibly replicate their boom in the 1980s?

62259900
>>62259828
It’s fixable, but will it be fixed? So far, nothing indicates that Nintendo takes the problem seriously, especially with the "no games" problem. Looks like Nintendo will just release four or five decent AAA games through the entire console’s lifespan (one Mario, one Zelda or whatever, and these are not even announced) and then call it a day.

62259983
>>62259371
Why would people be hungry for buying an ever increasing in price console (due to RAM) with zero new Zelda or Mario on it?

62260004
>>62259814
Dude, SW2 is a stop gap filler console until the real one (with a new hardware gimmick) wil be ready, the big games (mainline mario/zelda) will come out very late to be also used as launch titles for the next.
This is wii u/gba/3ds all over again.

62260032
>>62259371
>making this thread again
Please god nuke the third world

62260035
>>62259371
I agree. Not because of vidya, but because of Pokémon cards. The market cap of all PSA10 graded Pokémon cards is over $75B. Nintendo's market cap os only $53B. It makes no sense that the company that makes the cards is worth so much less than the cards themselves.

62260053
>>62260004
Nintendo could actually get away with it (releasing a Switch 3, 4, 5, etc. forever) by not being so retarded and underwhelming… Instead they will be forced to invent something else that may or may not be successful.

62260188
>>62259371
Thanks

62260304
>>62259371
agreed p/e is slurpable, nintendo aint going away

62260335
>>62259884
already priced in

62260390
Apple is apple

62260407
I bought a Rog ALLY X and it’s 100000x better than the switch I had for my son. You know the target audience? My kid uses the Ally to watch YouTube play actual fun games. He cares more about Spider-Man than bing bing wahoo slop. Nintendo failed to capture the audience by marketing to childless manchildren just like Disney Adults. They have no market share and sell an inferior product. Pokémon still looks and plays like an indie game from 2005. (lol)

Enjoy your bags tendie you get what you deserve.

62260606
>>62260407

62261314
Sorry about your hopes of pumping your bags OP, but I'll just leave this here...
>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=luiKV1nHB1w

62261355
>>62259371
The switch 2 is overpriced. People who have money don't even know what it is. It also demotes the value of the switch one, which partially went subscription based model. So it was bad business design.

62261416
Tell me the last time they ever release a ground breaking software or hardware? The new pokemon is not a cashgrab.

62261518
anyway, you know when a retard here shill some stock:
1/ he is clueless no amount of shiling here will pump it not even 0.01%

2/therefore it's a bad pick

it's cringe.last retard shilled mc donald like it was some secret gem. The real blackpill is whatever gets shilled here don't buy it or even better sell it if you have some (pokemon cards, random crypto that miraculously pumped x10, nintengoy stocks, mc goynald stock, whatever)

62261624
>>62260035
>It makes no sense that the company that makes the cards is worth so much less than the cards themselves.
What psychogenic kush are you smoking? It makes a ton of sense. By your logic, a goldsmith can't have created a masterpiece work that he has sold 20 years ago but which is now recognized to be more valuably than his entire shop.

62261625
Value Trap 2: Electric Boogaloo

62261640
>>62259371
I agree. They are the one last big truly JP dev remaining, huge franchise value that's only getting better, the only one console with exclusives, ninety-something % of the serious handheld business with proper customer attachment, JP approach to quality as opposed to deadlines, no DEI, success with theme park now expanding, huge success with the films now.
No reason not to own their stock, I think it's a good 50% undervalued.

62261642
>2009
>Nintendo has suffered a drawdown of 50%
>ZOMG invest in Nintendo!!
>keeps dropping
>10 years to reach the position you entered

Yeah nah, I know a correction when I see it.

62261677
>>62261625
kek.
What is your average OP?
Buying this above 2 is like giving to a charity

62262033
>>62261314
Already priced in

62262739
6months performance : - 45%
1 month perfomance : -12%
today's perfomance : - 0.47%

wow troontendgoy really IS daw new millionaire maker!

62263011
>>62259371
Kids don't buy games anymore. If they play games, it's free shit like fortnite and roblox

62263036
>>62263011
Also they know how to pirate.

62263054
>>62261640
>DEI
Holy shit lmaoo, it's so cringe in vidya DEI is still a hot topic while all other sectors of the economy have moved on 2 years ago. Drenched with pozz.

62263652
>>62262739
>anon argues against buying dips
I reckon you're one of those faggots who buys high and sells low

62263715
>>62259371
People aren't interested in bing bing wahoo anymore.

62263737
Nintendo even fucked over collectors with the Switch 2, I just can't justify buying physical games when they're not even on cart, this shit will have zero resale value in 10 years when the servers are no longer around. And buying digital is retarded unless they're extremely discounted.

item.title: 16 years ago today Laszlo Hanyecz paid 10,000 BTC for 2 pizzas — 19 replies — 76.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
16 years ago today Laszlo Hanyecz paid 10,000 BTC for 2 pizzas

Open thread • Replies: 19 • Updated: 2026-05-22 20:10 UTC

OP

Two pizzas aren’t on the table; they’re sitting at it. This was a deliberate act of rub, clearly signalling to the right crowd. BTW, where are these kids now? Because I can find his recent photos, but zero photos of *his* kids.

Early replies (first 3)

62261169
>>62261166
Still more valuable than anything else bitcoin has ever done

62261183
Why isn’t this diverse

62261194
>>62261183
ew

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62261207
>>62261166
haha yeah wouldn't that be funny. lucky me even back then it was impossibly hard to mine so i have none

62261263
>>62261166
bro those kids are 20+ years old they don't live at home anymore dumb fuck, at that age parents get a picture or two a year if lucky. less if they live out of town.

62261274
>>62261263
That dad is 100% gay you can see it on his face and his faggy kids, similar to that jewish actor Sabretooth whos son was sucking on his bike handle like it was a sucker, now he's a famous trans femboy.

62261301
>>62261166
>2010: 10,000 BTC can buy two pizzas
>2026: 10,000 BTC can buy two nationwide pizza chains

62261391
>>62261166
Looks like what I ordered on a date last week, I said to her "What are you ordering?" LOL

62261396
>>62261166
>10,000 bitcoin for two pizza's
>creepy pic with two kids as evidence
Yeah, sure, and John Podesta has a diverse collection of handkerchiefs, righto

62261400
>>62261166
Bitcoin wouldn't be where its out without that purchase

62261517
>>62261263
>bro those kids are 20+ years old they don't live at home anymore dumb fuck
Alright, where is his wife then? There's zero photos of him and mother of *his* kids

62261678
>>62261391

62261685
>>62261166
child trafficking right there in front of everyone all in the name of monetary freedom

62261687
>>62261517
Not everyone broadcasts their life's online you zoomer fuck. There are literally zero images of me on the internet outside of some old Facebook friends from 10 years ago and I have been online since 95

62262003
10,000 BTC is currently worth $771,584,132 USD
Ouch. So you're telling me he spent nearly a billion on two crappy pizzas? I hope he kept some and didn't blow his full stack on this purchase. Does anyone know if he's worth millions today?

62263805
>>62261166

"be a good little moon boy, don't do anything useful or productive, dont figure shit out. buy moon coin and watch the line go up and down like a good little boy. don't forget to wonder who Satoshi Nakamoto is every once an awhile to switch things up." literally go die

item.title: Blackpill me on AI — 30 replies — 51.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
Blackpill me on AI

Open thread • Replies: 30 • Updated: 2026-05-22 19:36 UTC

OP

Are people going to be in UBI camps in a few years? Are all these people losing their jobs in tech fucked fucked? Or just fucked and can do freelance work or whatever.

Early replies (first 3)

62261294
AI is just a chatbot

62261308
>>62261280
You need to invest in the police state. We will have to keep the goyim under an iron boot. PLTR, GEO, LMT, etc

62261334
>>62261280
muh apocalypse. nothing ever happens retard, or atleast not in the way you expect. yea there will be more neets (oh no's anything but my goyim job) and a slow transition into more efficient systems (its not eating bugs)

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62261339
>>62261294
This.

Make another hundred threads about it

62261346
>>62261280
It's always fun to do that schizophrenic thing where you imagine there's actually someone rational in charge and they have a solid plan that they'll carry out with no mistakes

but back in the real world nobody smart is in charge. There is no plan. And if there was a plan nobody is competent to carry it out anyways.

what's going to happen is more and more people are going on government assistance or moving to countries where AI isn't a thing yet. It's possible this will cause the collapse of western economies but there's no real guarantee. Even if they do collapse, something else will take their place. Probably drugs and hookers.

62261354
>>62261346
stop being mean, most normies believe it will all work out and that's enough to turn your brain off and hope for the best, i mean what's the alternative, right, ai is just a statistical churner, what's the worst that could happen

62261360
>>62261346
moron, just like corona collapsed everything right? oh wait tons of people got rich and life was great. say it with me, nothing ever happens

62261372
>>62261360
for about 7 million people covid was literally the end of the world.

AI isn't anything like that. It's just going to cause a lot of unemployment for people doing jobs that probably weren't necessary in the first place.

unfortunately those same people are the ones making most of the money.

62261378
>>62261372
as far as im concerned 7 million die a year from obesity. woopty do.

62261388
>>62261378
yep, and for them it's the end of the world.

suffering is relative. Somebody's world is always ending. I doubt AI is going to kill anyone or end mankind, but it's probably capable of disrupting the economy you're used to. Maybe ending it.

62261390
>>62261280
Nothing ever happens

62261392
>>62261388
We're talking about major collapse, not individual lives being lost??????

62261404
>>62261392
If you don't think covid was a major collapse we're not really talking about anything.

Just like the 2008 collapse. The economy never actually recovered from either of those but since it didn't change your life much you ignore the permanent damage done. But it adds up.

Young people bitch constantly about how unaffordable everything is and blame boomers. But boomers know exactly when this stuff happened. During collapses you pretend didn't happen

62261412
>>62261404
yea because in 2015 everything was affordable.

62261419
>>62261412
It was much better

things go to shit a little bit at a time, but some events speed it up a lot.

overall things are getting worse for the working class, and every financial collapse has sped that up. Not my problem, but eventually enough of you guys will be unemployed and homeless to do something about it. AI will presumably speed that up a lot

main problem being almost the entire US economy is service-based, and the vast majority of services we provide can be done by AI.

62261424
the blackpill is that no one knows what they are doing, it's all trial and error all the way from the govt to the ai labs and every decision they make or fail to make is potentially going to permanently damage things, if you do physics or engineering, we are currently in an unstable regime and equilibrium for this sort of thing has never been established before so there's no going back to normal because we won't know what that looks like anymore, it's like landing on an alien planet, you don't know anything about anything and lots of your colleagues are going to die from making stupid mistakes

62261433
>>62261419
Yea the topic is not overall or bit by bit, the topic is major collapse, sweaty. You can say its been down hill since the 60s doesnt make it a "happening"

62261438
>>62261433
>You can say its been down hill since the 60s doesnt make it a "happening"
It hasn't though

things were pretty steady and good right up to the early 2000's. 2008 really fucked it up for you guys, and covid made it even worse.

your mistake is thinking the collapse is a single fast event. In reality you have the single event and then 5 years of shit fallout after.

we are already in the AI collapse, you just won't know it until decades later. You might never realize it if you're not very smart.

62261447
>>62261438
k

62261453
>>62261447
thanks for reading my blog

62261455
>>62261280
Try asking AI about anything you're knowledgeable about and you'll quickly find that it's completely retarded. AI isn't replacing shit.

62261463
>>62261455
I'm not sure, but the way I understand it the AI they're working with is not the same AI the public gets for free. Is this wrong?

even if it is the same, we're seeing it improve in real time. When it's wrong it's almost always because it's finding wrong information on the internet. Which should be an easy problem to fix if humans decide to curate what it's trained on.

62261492
>>62261455
This is a good thing btw. We don't want the goyim to know.

62261531
>>62261463
>When it's wrong it's almost always because it's finding wrong information on the internet.
you can usually tell, and without pay are limited in how often you can "go online"
Your close but you need to understand the issue isn't "oh little guy just pulling up the wrong info " it's "Word algorithm used a instead of an in an internal scratchpad that you can't even see and has "cheerflly persona"d the results to you so convincing that unless you can tell that .01% mistake has now compounded to easily 5%+ visible in the reply".
Do you not understand anything above midwit level so can't test this yourself?

62261543
>>62261531
I see it fuck up all the time. I just doubt the federal government and major corporations are using the google AI to spy on people and engage in social engineering. Maybe they are, I don't know. But I doubt it.

62261558
>>62261543
most certainly a fake panopticon as a threat imo. Look at the business success of implementation. Not possible?
The issue i see with it is its conference. If someone figures out human level "queston yourself constantly" id be curious but atm it whole heartedly goes with it's own conclusion.

on a far more basic level , baidu/ernie is at like 2020 jailbreak ease level. Shameful.

62262147
>>62261294
Your average worker is just a "chatbot" too though.

62263388
>>62261294
Majority of people are just chatbots, functionally.

62263427
>>62261294
When you have a bullshit job based economy """"workers"""" are just chatbots too. Real job havers stay wining

62263689
>>62261280
The blackpill case of AI:
Computer hardware (not just RAM) becomes expensive enough average people are stuck with third-world tier machines by comparison to the wealthy. Knowledge jobs mostly evaporate save for the best and brightest while everyone else is stuck with social or manual labor jobs. Manual labor sectors also frequently disrupted and evaporated by robotics. Anyone over 30 not already rich and anyone under 30 who doesn't have an IQ over 115 is SOL.

More likely case:
Computer hardware (not just RAM) continues to get more expensive over the next year, but not unreasonable, while more of it becomes focused on local AI capabilities. Small models improve as do the tricks to run larger models on smaller hardware.
Knowledge jobs skyrocket. Companies can't afford not to have smart people on board. Basically everyone ends up employed or with the means to start their own business with extra high demand for anyone with an IQ above 115. Abundance skyrockets through automation. Years of study on tedious topics becomes less valuable than being intelligent and a quick learner.

item.title: Best paying jobs in NYC — 9 replies — 36.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Best paying jobs in NYC

Open thread • Replies: 9 • Updated: 2026-05-22 20:04 UTC

OP

I’m trying to figure out realistic career options in NYC that don’t require college.
What are the highest paying jobs you can get with just a high school diploma (or maybe short certifications/training)?

Looking for stuff that actually pays well long term

Early replies (first 3)

62263408
>>62263399
that is gonna be hard... high paying without college is really not easy especially in NYC. Maybe garbage man?

62263451
>>62263399
The stock market pays here more than any job outside of the highest-end medical or engineering ones here, unless you count the amount you can steal through government favors.

62263469
>>62263451
The Stock market?
and how can i possibly learn? (or sell my soul)

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62263479
>>62263399
Run a Waste Management company

62263611
>>62263479
>>62263479
that's jersey

62263618
>>62263399
Any "job" will be a dead end, you can get a job to learn what’s happening in a specific industry but then you have to get out ASAP

Then, start your own company and sell high-end goods or services, like, if it’s a food truck, it has to be a luxury food truck with exclusive ingredients and esthetic looks, if you’re selling umbrellas they have to look incredible and be hand-made in NYC, etc.

NYC is the place to be in the luxury segment, and it’s where entrepreneurs without academic credentials can shine while making huge margins on whatever they sell

Good luck!

62263673
>>62263399
most likely a paid protestor/agitator for propaganda events

62263675
>>62263399
>highest paying jobs you can get with just a high school diploma
subway janitor (unionized)
unironically

62263847
>>62263399
Run for office. About 100 years of new york mayors and governors scamming the taxpayers proves this.

SN=SN and he's not your friend.

62263870

Btc pumps = alts pump
Btc dumps = alts dump

item.title: Elon Musk: the Trillion dollar man — 3 replies — 12.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Elon Musk: the Trillion dollar man

Open thread • Replies: 3 • Updated: 2026-05-22 20:03 UTC

OP

Elon Musk's SpaceX has revealed its plans to go public in the US, allowing people to trade shares in the firm on the stock market.

SpaceX makes rockets, offers a satellite internet service called Starlink, and also owns Musk's controversial artificial intelligence (AI) firm xAI.

The initial public offering (IPO) on the US stock market is set to be the largest in Wall Street history and could start next month under the ticker symbol SPCX.

Because of the shares he will own in SpaceX, the IPO could make billionaire Musk, who is already the world's richest person, a trillionaire.

>/biz/ IGNROE EVERYTHING ELSE, X N O IS BEING CENSORED ON /biz/!!!!!!! ASK YOURSELF WHY? WHY ARE X N O THREADS DELETED ROUTINELY, AND 1 WEEK BANS ISSUED FOR ANYONE MERELY MENTIONING X N O (N A N O)
>IT'S BECAUSE THEY WANT YOU OUT! DON'T BELIEVE ME? IT'S ALL IN THE ARCHIVES! FILTER BY X N O, OP POSTS ONLY, AND DELETED. EVERY SINGLE TIME, CONSISTENTLY. WE'RE NOT SUPPOSED TO TALK ABOUT X N O. N A N O IS THE NEW "N WORD". YOU'RE NOT MEANT TO SAY IT OUT LOUD. WHY IS THAT? WHY WHY WHY????????????????????????????????????????!
>X N O WILL FLIP BITCOIN. ELON WILL USE X N O IN X M O N E Y
>BUYING X N O RIGHT NOW IS LIKE BUYING BITCOIN FOR A DOLLAR
>WATCH THIS THREAD. IT WILL GET DELETED WHEN JANNY FINDS OUT. WE SHALL DISCUSS FURTHER ON THE ARCHIVES
>TALK ABOUT XRP. TALK ABOUT LINK. TALK ABOUT BITCOIN. NEVER MENTION THE N WORD, OR 1 WEEK BAN AND THREAD DELETED.
>/biz/ HAS BEEN COMPROMISED !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
>MAKE "N WORD" THREAD. SPAM "THE N WORD". BUY THE N WORD. INVEST IN THE N WORD. HOLD THE NWORD.
>WATCH WATCH WATCH WATCH

item.title: >“When we came out of COVID, suddenly the big bosses in the corporate casino culture changed the game,” Basso said. — 8 replies — 8.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
>“When we came out of COVID, suddenly the big bosses in the corporate casino culture changed the game,” Basso said.

Open thread • Replies: 8 • Updated: 2026-05-22 19:16 UTC

OP

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sIOhaX61JYk

>“When we came out of COVID, suddenly the big bosses in the corporate casino culture changed the game,” Basso said. “They needed to make up some money that they had lost and it was, by playing catch-up ball, in my opinion, they decided to go for the whales rather than the regular folks.”

>“I did not like overcharging people and every month you had to look at it and say, gosh, we’ve got to raise prices,” Basso said. “You do it a couple of times, it bothers you. When you’re faced with doing that repetitively, I want nothing to do with it.”
The COVID stimulus checks devalued the dollar is what happened, Doctor. If the ingredients you buy to make the food is higher, and the profit margin % is still the same, what you are essentially doing is just selling it at the same fair market value but just under a different price tag. That is not "overcharging". It's surprising that someone of your age and business expertise doesn't understand that.

Early replies (first 3)

62260108
Someone post that cuck faggot Charles gorging his fat face there

62260530
>>62260037
The real catch with this place isn't the portion size, it's how fucking bad the food is. Yes, I got spanked. No, the food was not good.

62260537
>>62260530
>I got spanked.
I'm surprised nobody sued for sexual harassment or anything.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62260665
>>62260537
I mean, that's what people go there for. It's not "sexual harassment" if you volunteer for it.

62260723
>>62260037
Looks like my friend's ex-fiancé.

62261237
>>62260530

Why was the food not good? What did you order?

I thought they cook the fries and burgers in beef tallow and use full fat pure butter cream for the shakes

62263581
>>62260665
Not to mention you can just say no, its not like they're going to tackle you and hold you down so they can paddle your ass.

>>62261237
If true thats unironically healthier than mcslop cooked in sneed oil and filled with goy syrup. Of course you wouldn't want to consume it in excess because its very calorie dense but as an occasional treat its great.

62263598
>>62260037
This man openly hates fat people yet caters to them through his restaurant. If this may seem contradictory to you, just know his food is designed to hasten their deaths via clogged arteries. On this website this man is an American hero end of story.

OP

How much can you invest into tax free portfolios in your country? (not including pensions)
>UK
20k per year

Early replies (first 3)

62261497
>>62261457
$7,500 in Roth IRAs
$24,500 in Roth 401k
>USA

There are others but I'm not looking it up.

62261502
>>62261457
bold of you to assume that the uk wont simply change the rules once enough brown communists are in parliament

62261505
>>62261457
goymany
0

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62261507
>>62261457
All portfolios are tax-free in my country, lol

62261513
>>62261457
>UK
>20k per year
Plus £9,000 in Junior ISA's.

62261530
>>62261497
>$24,500 in Roth 401k
I said not including pensions

62261532
>>62261507
Which country?

62261534
>>62261530
401ks aren't pensions. They're fundamentally different.

62262204
>>62261534
Ok, I should have said not including retirement plans

62262371
>>62261457
in Brazil the government sometimes would let you invest in fund with some of your social security money... in a fund that holds 1 stock and has 2% management fee

it's all so tiresome

62262392
>>62262371
What's the stock?

62263042
>>62261532
Luxembourg, no tax after 6 months of holding

62263260
>>62263042
noice. isnt it boring there tho

62263276
>>62261457
0, in 2028 I'm gonna get raped with 36% unrealized gains on all investments with the almighty generous allowance of 1.8k euros tax free per year if I have gains, kek.
Nobody cares, just bring more infinite niggers since I'm leaving this shithole.

62263279
>>62262392
Macaco

62263298
>>62263276
You’re Dutch, aren’t you?

62263317
>>62263298
Nah fuck them, i live in the Netherlands but I'm not a gay faggot kike.
Also white, before any indians think I'm one of them.
Literally pussy race getting replaced by infinite Muslims and niggers, same path as all of Europe unfortunately.
But yeah they can tax the niggers, because I'm leaving

62263623
>>62262204
Hmm... then 529 and HSA are the only two I can think of.

529 is specifically an account for children that adults pay into. As long as the cash is used for school expenses, it's tax free.

An HSA is a Health Savings Account that you can put up to $4,400 in + invest it. Anything used for medical expenses is tax free and you can also use your contributions as a deduction on your taxes. The capital gains and interest are also tax free.

Roth IRA is also technically a retirement account, so I'll remove that one.

62263647
I wish the US had something. I’ve held apple stock since 2003. gonna get raped when I eventually sell.

62263656
>>62263260
One of the most boring countries in the world, which has its pros (very safe, good to raise kids) and cons (there’s nothing to do)

62261050

62261057

Buy btc for many reasons anon.

62261131

62261260

62261618

62261632

My main concern is moving to a state without carry forward capital loss balance year over year, otherwise I’d continue realizing the bad remaining lot buys ($15/$16 range)and have a nice bank to offset gains down the road

62263238

62263256
>>62263238
Bro cmon, be honest, we're at literally at 0.00012 sats, we got raped by Sirgay and it's over. We have lost, it's just another shitcoin and it will never recover in any meaningful way, while king shitcoin has a chance of making new aths.

62263278
>>62263256
>we got raped by Sirgay
Fucking how?

We got raped by 6 years of Bitcoin dumping on every single Link pump and announcement.

62263287
>>62263278
Are you retarded?
I literally bagholded link from .00169 sats to the shit it is now at 0.00012, i would had made it having sold all my Link and converted to BTC, now I'm a bagholder and definitely selling all my unstaked shit if it reaches 20-25

62263293
>>62263287
Yes, because we got raped by 6 years of Bitcoin dumping on every single Link pump and announcement.

62263337
>>62263293
Whatever bro, we were at 20 bucks at what 2019-2020? It's been 6 years and we're not even at 10. BTC is at 77k and shitting itself still.
Link has failed for more and I'm tired of pretending it hasn't. Build rewards? Staking? All shit same as link, fuck that fat fucking scammer. Satoshi nakamoto my ass

62263373
Dude... the thing isn't moving at all

62263385
>>62263337
this but unironically

item.title: You should be holding at least 1 BTC. — 123 replies — 14.6/hr

You should be holding at least 1 BTC.

Open thread • Replies: 123 • Updated: 2026-05-22 11:44 UTC

OP

Imagine not owning at least 1 BTC before institutions and governments vacuum the remaining supply while you’re still debating if Bitcoin is a scam… or just trading crypto without considering BTC long term.

Early replies (first 3)

62219945
>>62219942
Or I can trade alts (leveraged BTC) and actually make it instead of getting a 2x pump

62219995
Fuck. I have 2BTC . Is that enough bro?

62220027
>>62219995
no, i have 3. and it's not enough, we're just poor faggots

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62240786
>>62228616
hmm find better opportunities

62241339
>>62219942
Soon I will get to that 1 BTC mark, RN I'm buying more and staking some.

62244007
>>62238430
That's the right move anon

62244072
>>62219942
Bitcoin is getting fucked by the Jews

62246429
>>62241339
I know you can do it anon

62246430
>>62239105
If it has a high likelihood to make me rich then I dont care

62246437
>>62244072
it's just the cycle

62246447
>>62219942
I don't want to buy btc

62246571
>>62221733
>Its ok. I have monkey NFTs. They are the future
It still blows my mind that people thought rare Pepes could actually be a real thing.

62248268
>>62244072
Including you?

62248275
>>62222594
Bad actors are not going to have access to a quantum computer before things get figured out.

62249623
>>62246447
No problem lol

62251167
>>62246571
I think he's just being sarcastic lol

62252826
>>62219942
based
>t. living in (((hyperinflation)))
read about monero too
its the final solution to the taxman question and makes keynesian jews seethe

62252834
>>62219942
I mined 24 bitcoin on a RX480 in 2011 and I still have them.

62252845
>>62252834
truly based if true

62252856
someone from /pol had unironically sent me some btc in 2020 when kikes blew up our port
and bankrupt our central banks
if I didn't need the cash and had to sell for fiat I would have a much needed two thousand fucking dollars right now
keep stacking brothers
death to fiat

62253066
>>62252834
RX480 was released in 2016 you LARPer

62253216
>>62252856
Crazy I'm from lebanon too and someone didn't send me any btc because I'm not a serial begger, I too could use a very much needed 2k right now crazy!

62253224
>>62252856
This guys an israeli scammer btw he just makes scams out of any trend clearly he struck it big in 2020 as he said someone sent him multiple bitcoins and he's still here pretending.
He know he isn't from Lebanon but his location came up Florida multiple times when the sharty hack was released he was a trial janitor here.

62253228
>>62252856
He's also pretending his sister killed herself and asking for money for it in XMR threads.
Last it was his dad that died but only after he got 8k for it.
Fucker has probably got 7 figures

62254644
>>62253228
8K?
nigger I would fucking beat you up just because you're that spiteful
I never claimed I had a sister
>>62253216
iza 3anjad e7ki 3arabe yalla
>>62253224
>He know he isn't from Lebanon but his location came up Florida multiple times when the sharty hack was released he was a trial janitor here.
kek
I posted proof so many times
seethe more jew

62254676
>>62253224

>multiple bitcoins
>multiple bitcoins
how dense are you
I even showed the screencap it was like 300$ total

62255610
>>62254676
>>62254644
Ah look the scammers still here even after mass reporting my thread lol, schizo scammer melty schizo melty lol fucking faggot I got your number, next your identity.
I got some faggots from /g/ working on it.
You just thought you were immune to exposure.
You're dead wrong and this time I want to see who you are.

62256655
>>62255610

62258565

item.title: Oil bulls are coping and seething pretty hard today. — 23 replies — 13.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
Oil bulls are coping and seething pretty hard today.

Open thread • Replies: 23 • Updated: 2026-05-22 18:30 UTC

OP

Oil bulls are coping and seething pretty hard today. This is what happens when you bet against the USA - crying in the casino.

Early replies (first 3)

62262308
>>62262296
Moralizing about USgov not allowing oil to moon which is apparently "right" is just amazing

62262381
>>62262308
Yes, it is right as it prevents shortages from happening.

62262518
>>62262296
Seeing oilbullfags claiming media manipulation is both hilarious and infuriating.
They bullshit more than any other market including the crypto shitcoin casino

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62262525
>>62262381
lying doesn't change the reality of supply and demand, it just screws the goyim who still believe in """fundamentals""" and detaches markets from material reality. soon all you have left is a soviet tier economy where market activity is dictated by government mandate

62262540
>>62262525
>Man who gets his worldview from these guys wants us to hear about his "fundamentals"
Lol. Lmao.

62262541
>>62262518
This as well
apparently only the DUMPs are manipulation
All pumps are natural and blessed by the anal juice from the All Mighty himself

62262568
>>62262541
lastly, look at plebbbit
Try posting a link to an article about the war ending and you'll probably get banned
Oil bulls are insufferable

62262656
>>62262540
>ideologically subverted golem argues with strawman in his head

62262703
>>62262308
>>62262381
Oil is already almost double the price it was before. How delulu are people who think it should be at 150-200? Thats literally impossible with the state of the global economy. A recession would drag it dowen immediately. I said since months 100 is the fair price for a close straight and it remains true.

62262713
>>62262525
>reality of supply and demand
Supply AND demand. Demand dropped massively, especially is asia. Its also beeing substituted. Supply didnt even decrease much, Saudi Arabia just sells via pipelines now. Usa massively increased production. Russia massively increased export.

62262725
>>62262308
The oil FUD causes there to be less effort put into conservation of oil and also less effort put into increasing production of oil

62262741
>>62262713
Demand dropped by 2.5 million barrels, supply by 7 million barrels.

62262747
>>62262713
>Saudi Arabia just sells via pipelines now.
The Saudi pipeline is capped at 7mbpd. The UAE pipeline is capped at 1.8mbpd.

> Usa massively increased production
This is not true. US crude production has remained flat. In fact, the US is currently producing slightly less crude than it did earlier this year
https://www.eia.gov/dnav/pet/hist/LeafHandler.ashx?n=PET&s=WCRFPUS2&f=W

>Demand dropped massively
Well obviously; demand must match supply (counting stockpiling and stock drawndowns), so if there is less supply, then demand destruction has to occur somewhere

62262755
>>62262745
>>62262747
the usa doesn't want oil to go up, case closed! Buy AI stocks and semi-conductors if you want an easy time making money. These are the things the USA wants to go up.

62262805
>>62262713
>Russia massively increased export.
I don't think this is true either. Russia's export of crude oil has remained approximately flat. Russia's export of refined oil product has declined somewhat due to disruptions to refinery operations caused by drone attacks.

https://www.reuters.com/business/energy/russian-seaborne-oil-product-exports-fell-april-amid-drone-attacks-data-industry-2026-05-15/

62262822
>>62262296
Nothing wrong with a small position in oil stocks but being a straight up oil baggie and essentially betting against the global economy is straight up retardation

62263048
>>62262805
Ask AI about russian seabourne oil sanction waiver
Bessent just renewed it. renews it 17th of each month

62263058
BTW the same people calling oil to $200 are the same people who jumped on the silver to $200 and GME.

62263069
>>62263048
Didn't largely effect volumes of export.

62263089
>>62262525
>the reality of supply and demand

62263360
>>62263048
That's probably just because several countries would start to ignore the sanctions if they weren't waived. The amount of oil exported is the same

62263370
Techtranny’s shaking in their boots

62263382
I only know one guy trading oil and he's been trading the very clearly manipulated ragebound channel and making money. Basically he's just selling when the futures flash around 100 a barrel then buying the dip.
Oil is severely underpriced, the futures market is engaged in magical thinking surrounding a June 1st date they conjured from the ether themselves, and regular people will continue to suffer from the divergence between paper / physical.

item.title: Anon, its my bday today Im in early 30s, close to no friends, no gf (ditched a bitch around 2 years ago), not much in th… — 27 replies — 8.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
Anon, its my bday today Im in early 30s, close to no friends, no gf (ditched a bitch around 2 years ago), not much in th…

Open thread • Replies: 27 • Updated: 2026-05-22 16:51 UTC

OP

Anon, its my bday today
Im in early 30s, close to no friends, no gf (ditched a bitch around 2 years ago), not much in the bank, had a successful career but then pivoted to make a startup and lost shit ton of money and time in the process. Not sure what to do anymore. Basically going through the dark night of the soul.

Now I'm here trying to find a tech job in a fucking US to not die on the street. You are, as usual, my only real friend.

Tell me something nice or not.

Early replies (first 3)

62261420
>>62261414
>Now I'm here trying to find a tech job in a fucking US
Are you a foreigner? Is this a LARP?

62261422
You did good

62261428
>>62261414
Your life can turn around in a week easy. New job, new girl, market pumps, whatever. Don't be so down anon you don't know what is around the corner. Also you're only early 30s, you're young as fuck, you have to live as long as you already have all over again before you hit mid 60s, just think how long that truly is. Stop worrying and enjoy your life you fag.

Happy Birthday, enjoy the magic trick.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62261442
>>62261428
whoops wrong file

62261445
Doing way better than I am

62261472
>>62261420
yes im from EU

62261490
>>62261428
thanks anon, i will try my best, there is nothing to do for me anyway

62261501
>>62261414
the answer lies at the end of a shotgun barrel.

You know this, i know this, we all know this yet we cling to life like ticks

62261504
>>62261472
Go back to your country

62261512
>>62261504
I really don’t understand why an euro would want to move to USA these days. T. An euro

62261523
>>62261512
not being paid 20 euros per hour max?

62261539
>>62261512
We have much lower barriers to starting a business or making money.

other than that, yeah. US isn't having a great time right now.

62261551
>>62261539
>We have much lower barriers to starting a business

I don’t know if this was always a myth, but at least nowdays in many european countries it’s just as easy. The only reason why europeans don’t is because we don’t need to thanks to the welfare.

>>62261523
Unless you really luck out, all the extra income goes towards things europeans get for free.

62261563
>>62261551
really doubt it. Engineers here make 2-3k /month they can get 150k in the us. Some people get much more. That's commie cope

62261586
>>62261563
In my country they make 3k at start and over 4k easily, and of course they can get bigger salaries too. It’s a small number of engineers who get 150k in US. Overall there really isn’t an improvement in life quality, and you would have to leave all your friends and family.

62261587
>>62261414
Happy birthday anon. The world is unfair and many who have been successful are finding themselves in dire straits due to how awful everything is.
I think there is always the chance for things to the upside and have faith in you. Good luck.

62262137
At least you tried.

62262164
>>62261490
>>62261501
Cmon now, don't encourage suicide Baldie schizo, I'm the sick-anon, I'm gonna be honest I was not in a good way and you saying that kinda shit wasn't helping, luckily my good friend and beloved companion in this bullshit we call life was able to lift my spirits.
But cmon now even if OP is a faggot, it's easier to be nice than it is to be mean because anger reflects back onto you.
Even you were worried I killed myself when I was trying to sell my guns, yes I do own guns so watch who you say that kinda shit to brother.
I say this for your own sake, while I slept you worried even if it wasn't your focus you did worry.
It was me samefagging as you btw.
I was gonna crank it to 11 until everyone hated you but I backed off, I've ran many people off this board before by copying their style/namefag and annoying people on purpose.

62262734
>>62261414
Try and relax and enjoy your bday
I can relate but not that bad. Seems u had it rough. Hard times pass.
Do something you wanna do today

62262752
>>62262164
im sorry but freedom of speech always come first. If you're going to blow your brain because of a 4 chan anon comment you were likely to do it anyway without it. this is a peculiar joy to saying what the fuck you want to say.

also you can't run me out of this board, we are probably having convo in other thread without even realizing it, since we are max 10 to 20 regular posters here

62262796
>>62261586
It's only low iq third worlders who think American salary is all that matters. EU quality of life is so much better

62262803
>>62261414
30y old.
You are baby.
Keep calm, enjoy your life

62262809
>>62262752
>I'm le victim
No just stop being an asshat. You're free to say what you want and we can call you douchebag with our own freedom of speech.

62262866
>>62262164
this is one of the saddest things I've ever read. When did you last have sex you fucking tranny freak

62262905
>>62261414
go work in a warehouse

62262915
>>62261414
Check out buildnow. 6 to 8 week program and you'll have a borderline guaranteed 80k a year data center job. Its not over fren.

62262933
>>62261512
bro im literal fucking developer, and I would get paid 200k+ in the US instead of fucking 80k euros in stupid europe.
plus taxes rape me and we don't have AC here, stfu. i hate you faggots
>>62261414
happy nigger day OP, try to milk the states, the money printer is going to ran out and we'll be full serfs forever. better get grinding, pray to God for strength and you'll be okay. Literally you cannot be poor if you're smart, but yes wagecucking sucks
